title: FPS - Display
description: A simple mod that displays the current FPS on screen
body:
## 📗 About A simple Fabric mod that displays the current FPS on screen. Available for ALL Minecraft versions, where Fabric is supported! ## 🖼️ Showcase ![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DIlqwRFH/images/aa98e930fee7432a64154db55f6266376c67e91a.png)
Settings Menu ![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DIlqwRFH/images/95eb1c450d4b1d0830f00397288e880d167a0b3c.png)

## 🐸 Compatibility **Quilt:** This mod is primarily developed for the Fabric loader and bundles some modules from the fabric-api in order to run standalone. Currently it seems to work with Quilt loader but there could potentially be some issues in the future. **NeoForge:** I don't plan to port this mod to Forge/NeoForge anytime soon, but some users have had success using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) as a compatibility layer. No support will be provided when using this, so use at your own risk! ## 🐞 Bugs and Issues If you find any bugs or have issues when using this mod, please report them on the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Grayray75/FPS-Display/issues). If you want to contribute features or translation feel free to open a new [Pull Request on GitHub](https://github.com/Grayray75/FPS-Display/pulls).
